subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! The former letters did not arrive, but the latter letter hath been received. From its perusal it became evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی نامه های سابق نرسید ولی نامه لاحق واصل شد از تلاوتش معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @growth of the Cause
